OneShot: World Machine Edition

Guide Niko, a child with a glowing lightbulb, through a mysterious dying world to restore the Sun Machine. Navigate through increasingly complex puzzle rooms filled with obstacles, switches, and locked doors. The world is aware of your presence - switches remember their states, and your actions have consequences. Reach the Sun Chamber and place the lightbulb to restore light to this forsaken realm. You only have one shot at saving this world.

Arrow Keys: Move Niko | Space: Interact with switches and doors | Z: Pick up/Put down the lightbulb | Shift: Sprint (moves faster) | Enter: Start game | Esc: Pause/Unpause | R: Restart

OneShot: World Machine Edition

Guide Niko, a child with a glowing lightbulb, through a mysterious dying world to restore the Sun Machine. Navigate through increasingly complex puzzle rooms filled with obstacles, switches, and locked doors. The world is aware of your presence - switches remember their states, and your actions have consequences. Reach the Sun Chamber and place the lightbulb to restore light to this forsaken realm. You only have one shot at saving this world.

Arrow Keys: Move Niko | Space: Interact with switches and doors | Z: Pick up/Put down the lightbulb | Shift: Sprint (moves faster) | Enter: Start game | Esc: Pause/Unpause | R: Restart

TEST_4.strategy_description: Approach various switches and activate them using Space key. Verify visual feedback and state changes. Test door unlocking after correct switch combinations are activated.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Switches toggle correctly when player is nearby and presses Space. Doors unlock when required switches are activated. Visual and state feedback is accurate.

TEST_5.test_description: Tests the lightbulb pickup and carry mechanic. Validates that the player can only pick up the lightbulb when certain conditions are met and that carrying it affects gameplay appropriately.
TEST_5.strategy_description: Navigate to the lightbulb location after unlocking necessary doors. Press Z to pick it up. Carry it through various rooms to test if it's properly tracked. Place it at the Sun Chamber to win.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: Lightbulb can be picked up and put down correctly. Visual indication shows when player is carrying it. Game tracks lightbulb state properly. Win condition triggers when placed at Sun Chamber.
